note: Second Reality demo sequence — 25 visual parts matching the original. Timings computed from buildTimeMap dry-run of actual S3M engine (MUSIC0: speed=6 tempo=125, MUSIC1: speed=3 tempo=130). MUSIC0 clips use original constant-BPM estimate (120 BPM patched); MUSIC1 clips use exact time map offsets.

musicSyncTable.note: Region boundaries from second-reality-js MusicPlayer.js. MUSIC0 plays pos 0:0→13:42 (MUSIC0_STOP), then MUSIC1 plays pos 0:0→84:0 (MUSIC1_STOP), then MUSIC0 resumes at pos 14:5. No silence gaps — music switches are instantaneous.
musicSyncTable.note2: MUSIC1.S3M header: speed=3 tempo=130 (57.6ms/row with gain). Clip times computed from buildTimeMap dry-run of actual S3M engine.

clips.notes: Opening credits text over scrolling landscape — ALKU (WILDFIRE). Sync: DEMO_START→ALKU_EXIT.
3D polygon ships flyover — U2A (PSI). Sync: U2A_START→PAM_START.
Pre-rendered explosion animation — PAM (TRUG/WILDFIRE). Sync: PAM_START→MUSIC0_STOP.
Second Reality title card — BEGLOGO. Music switches from MUSIC0 to MUSIC1. Sync: MUSIC0_STOP→CHECKERBOARD_FALL. Time from S3M map: MUSIC1 pos 2:46 = +6.56s.
Checkerboard fall transition — GLENZ (PSI). Sync: CHECKERBOARD_FALL→GLENZ_START. Time from S3M map: MUSIC1 pos 4:28 = +12.89s.
Translucent rotating polyhedra — GLENZ_3D (PSI). Sync: GLENZ_START→(estimated transition to TUNNELI, proportional).
Dot tunnel — concentric circles receding — TUNNELI (TRUG). Sync: (estimated start)→TECHNO_CIRCLES2_START. Time from S3M map: MUSIC1 pos 17:0 = +59.17s.
Circle interference / Moire patterns — TECHNO (PSI). Sync: TECHNO_CIRCLES2_START→TECHNO_BARS_TRANSITION.
4 synced bars transition — TECHNO (PSI). Sync: TECHNO_BARS_TRANSITION→TECHNO_BAR_FINAL_FLASH. Bar timing derived from musicsync.
Rotating layered bars with palette pulse — TECHNO (PSI). Sync: TECHNO_BAR_FINAL_FLASH→TECHNO_TROLL.
Troll picture + CRT shutdown — TECHNO/PANIC (PSI/WILDFIRE). Sync: TECHNO_TROLL→FOREST_START.
Mountain text scroller — FOREST/MNTSCRL (TRUG). Sync: FOREST_START→LENS_TRANSITION_START.
Lens picture slide-in — LENS (PSI). Sync: LENS_TRANSITION_START→LENS_BOUNCE.
Bouncing crystal ball over face — LENS_LENS (PSI). Sync: LENS_BOUNCE→LENS_ROTO.
Rotozoom of picture — LENS_ROTO (PSI). Sync: LENS_ROTO→PLZ_START.
Colorful plasma/smoke waves — PLZ_PLASMA (WILDFIRE). Sync: PLZ_START→PLZ_CUBE_START.
Texture-mapped rotating 3D cube — PLZ_CUBE (WILDFIRE). Sync: PLZ_CUBE_START→PLZ_CUBE_END.
1024 mini vector balls with gravity — DOTS/MINVBALL (PSI). Sync: PLZ_CUBE_END→WATER_START.
Mirror ball scroller — sword on water background — WATER/RAYSCRL (TRUG). Sync: WATER_START→COMAN_START.
3D sinusfield / voxel landscape — COMAN/3DSINFLD (PSI). Sync: COMAN_START→MUSIC1_STOP.
Jelly-distorted Future Crew logo — JPLOGO (PSI). Music switches from MUSIC1 back to MUSIC0.
3D city polygon flyover — U2E (PSI). Sync: U2E_START→U2E_END. Time from S3M map: MUSIC0 pos 21:27 offset from 14:5.
End picture flash — ENDLOGO. Sync: U2E_END→CREDITS_START.
Scrolling credits with demo screenshots — CREDITS. Sync: CREDITS_START→CREDITS_END.
Vertical text scroller (greetings) — ENDSCRL (WILDFIRE). After CREDITS_END.
